#Text=why do i always say yes to you?
#Text="come onnn, itd be fun!"

#Text="i am not doing matching costumes with you. it was bad enough on halloween. people dont even wear costumes on christmas.." ena grumbled. mizuki had been trying to convince her for the past hour now, and it evidently has not been working. time to use their secret plan.
#Text="you're not even busy on christmas day though, are you?
#Text="god, im staring to regret this already." ena groaned, exasperated.
#Text=--
#Text="did we have to come here at nine in the morning?"
#Text=ena collapsed onto the cafe chair.
#Text="hey, its not my fault you ruined your sleep schedule. maybe you should start going to normal school again." mizuki teased.
#Text="hey- i'm not the only one with a messed up sleep schedule, we all do!

column3:
_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	_	

#Text=has anyone ever told you two that you bicker like a married couple?"

column1: #Text=the waitress asked, arriving at their table.
#Text="airi!
#Text="you're an idol, why would you need a side hustle.." ena asked, growing more confused.
#Text="i like to feel like a normal person sometimes." airi answered.
#Text="that's kinda depressing. anyways, we should probably order now?"
#Text=mizuki said noncommittally.
#Text="oh yeah. i'll have..."
#Text=--
#Text="sooo... where do we find costumes?"
#Text=mizuki asked.
#Text="i thought you knew where to find them.." ena replied. mizuki laughed nervously.
#Text="uhh.. well i though we would just work that out when we got here!"
#Text=ena gave them a death stare as they shuffled nervously.
#Text=ena sighed and looked away.
#Text="we should have just bought them on amazon."

#Text="but then they wouldn't have arrived on time." mizuki pouted, back to their usual self. what ena said had proved to them that she wasn't actually mad at them. they were good at telling things like that.
#Text="ooh, we could try that store!"
#Text=they grabbed ena's hand and rushed over.
#Text="wait- thats a soup store!"

#Text=she said, before a blush spread across her face upon realising the contact. unfortunately for her (and us), she didn't have time to bring it up before mizuki started complaining over the lack of clothes in the soup store.
#Text=--

#Text='thank god im finally home.' ena let out a relieved sigh with this thought. they had been to almost every store that sold clothes in the mall (and the soup store) before finally arriving at a costume store dedicated to chirstmas costumes. it was called... apathy christmas??
#Text=or something like that.

#Text=her relief was ruined when, upon walking into the house, she was immediately greeted by her father. as always, he had a monotone expression that always irritated ena. how could he look so empty, so bored, so remorseless, as he did anything. including as he insulted ena and her work to the point of tears.
#Text="we're having a christmas dinner on sunday." his voice brought her out of her thoughts.
#Text="i'm not going." she said bluntly.
#Text="fine." and that was it. the end of their interaction. he walked away, and she walked up the stairs to her room. she turned her pc on. she heard a knock at the door. she opened it. akito.
#Text="what do you want." she intended it in the same blunt tone she used with their father, but it just sounded tired. she was tired.

column4: Ena and Akito's father[4]|Akito and Ena[5]

column1: #Text="just wanted to check on you. i heard what happened downstairs." akito responded, walking in and sitting on her bed. she didn't complain, red flag #1.
#Text="i'm fine." she turned her head away, red flag #2.
#Text="what are you doing on christmas?"
#Text=he changed the topic.
#Text="going out with mizuki. they made me match costumes with them again." she said the last part with annoyance. green flag #1, the topic change worked.
#Text="hm. have fun getting annoyed. me and toya are going to ken's place." "...you're friends with his daughter why do you still call it 'ken's place'" she asked flatly.
#Text="because i respect him more than her. anyways, glad to see you're feeling better, i gotta go now. bye." he said as he got up.
#Text="hey, wait!
#Text=--
#Text="so theres this cafe i found thats open today, and we're going to go there!"
#Text=ena asked, confused.
#Text="i don't know. but since they aren't legally allowed to sell stuff on a public holiday or something like that, they're giving out free cake." mizuki answered.
#Text="do they have cheesecake?"
#Text=ena asked expectantly.
#Text="of course the first thing you ask about is cheesecake. it's kinda cute." mizuki giggled.
#Text="oh, shut up." ena turned her head away.
#Text="are you blushing?"
#Text=mizuki teased.
#Text="no!"
#Text=mizuki stopped her and walked in front of her, blocking her path.
#Text="get out of the way!"
#Text=ena whined.
#Text=mizuki cupped her face, startling her.
#Text="you're so cute when you're embarrassed." mizuki teased again, moving closer to ena.
#Text="shut up!"
#Text=ena said, but didn't pull away.
#Text="but it's true-" they were cut off by ena kissing them, before quickly pulling away.
#Text="i'm sorry-" she was interrupted by mizuki pulling her back in. so there they were, in the middle of the street in matching santa costumes, kissing. quite the romantic notion, don't you think?
